record.field: Can we schedule an interview for your {{ (object.job_id.name + ' ') if object.job_id else '' }}application?
Send this template when you want to invite an applicant to book their own interview slot through the Cyllo Appointment portal.

div.style: margin: 0; padding: 0; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;
div.div:
Thank you for your application and your interest in joining Our Company.
We would like to invite you to schedule a phone interview at a time that suits you. The session should last approximately 30 minutes — we will discuss your experience and motivations for joining the Our Company team.
Please use the button below to pick a slot that works best for you:
If the button above does not work, copy and paste the following link into your browser:
